emails.subject: Blue Dog
emails.body: Kay, Here is the electronic version of the Blue Dog Max contract. Do I get any bonus points for this??? Chris Forwarded by Chris Booth/NA/Enron on 01/02/2001 04:58 PM From: Brian D Barto@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT on 01/02/2001 04:54 PM

emails.subject: FW: Blue Dog
emails.body: FW: Blue Dog Kay, Is E-Next Generation LLC the correct entity as beneficiary? Chris

emails.subject: FW: Blue Dog
emails.body: FW: Blue Dog Kay, Is E-Next Generation LLC the correct entity as beneficiary? Chris

emails.subject: Re: FW: Blue Dog
emails.body: Re: FW: Blue Dog Yes, E-Next. You might advise Jeff that we will probably need a substitute LOC post-assignment. Kay
